title: On Providence: The Stoic World-Soul
description: Chrysippus on the rational soul of the cosmos, fate, and the identity of God with nature.
introduction: Chrysippus on the rational soul of the cosmos, fate, and the identity of God with nature.

translation.original_text: τὸν κόσμον ζῷον ἔμψυχον, λογικόν, ἔμφρον.
translation.text: The cosmos is a living being, ensouled, rational, and intelligent.

translation.original_text: εἱμαρμένην δὲ εἶναι τὸν τοῦ κόσμου λόγον.
translation.text: Fate is the rational principle of the cosmos.
